scripts.test:perf: mkdir -p _bmad-output/perf-reports && export EXIT_CODE=0; k6 run --summary-export=_bmad-output/perf-reports/read-summary.json perf/k6/api-read-scenarios.js || EXIT_CODE=$?; k6 run --summary-export=_bmad-output/perf-reports/write-summary.json perf/k6/api-write-scenarios.js || EXIT_CODE=$?; k6 run --summary-export=_bmad-output/perf-reports/bulk-load-summary.json perf/k6/bulk-load-scenario.js || EXIT_CODE=$?; exit $EXIT_CODE
